items.title: Senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
items.summary: US President Donald Trump said the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

items.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
items.summary: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

items.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
items.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

items.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
items.summary: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

items.title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
items.summary: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.

items.title: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
items.summary: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

items.title: New outbreak of Ebola kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
items.summary: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported - a case has also been reported in Uganda.

items.title: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
items.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

items.title: Palestinian leaders hold rare party meeting as polls show rising discontent
items.summary: The Fatah faction elects top decision makers, but ordinary Palestinians feel the party and its leader are out of touch.

items.title: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case
items.summary: It marks the third time a New York jury has considered the case against the 74-year-old disgraced film mogul.

items.title: Israel says it has killed Hamas commander in Gaza air strike
items.summary: Izz ad-Din al-Haddad, described as "one of the architects of the October 7 massacre", was killed in Gaza City, Israel says.

items.title: Trump says 20-year nuclear programme suspension by Iran would be enough
items.summary: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.

items.title: Prisoner swap goes ahead as Kyiv mourns 24 killed in Russian strike on flats
items.summary: Among the victims in Kyiv was 12-year-old Lyubava Yakovleva, whose father was killed during the war.

items.title: Five Italians die during cave scuba dive in Maldives
items.summary: Four of the Italians were part of a team from the University of Genoa.

items.title: AI vigilante trap snares alleged paedophile ex-teacher in France
items.summary: The 66-year-old handed himself in after an influencer used AI to pose as a 14-year-old girl and broadcast their conversation online.

items.title: New York Times defends journalist after Israel threatens to sue
items.summary: Israel's prime minister says he has ordered legal action over an article which alleged Israeli security officials raped Palestinian detainees.

items.title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
items.summary: The reported visit to Havana came after the US renewed an offer of aid to ease the effects of its oil blockade.

items.title: What China critics in Maga movement make of Trump's Beijing trip
items.summary: Trump’s softer approach towards China is one that experts say will likely trickle down to the wider MAGA base.

items.title: What is a 'safe death'? Mentally ill woman asks for assisted dying in Canada
items.summary: Canada has twice delayed access to medically assisted dying for those with mental illness. Claire Brosseau says she cannot wait any longer and wants the courts to decide.

items.title: From misfit to rap sensation: A 'Reble' storms into Indian hip-hop
items.summary: Reble has emerged as one of hip-hop’s most distinctive new voices, channelling defiance into a sound rooted in India’s northeast.

items.title: Alleged murder of Aboriginal girl highlights Australia's deep inequalities
items.summary: Her death has sparked outrage across Australia and intense debate about disparities in society.

items.title: Anti-immigration AI videos traced to overseas fakers, BBC finds
items.summary: "Patriotic" UK anti-immigration social media accounts have been traced to Sri Lanka and Vietnam.

items.title: Why is Ireland not taking part in this year's Eurovision?
items.summary: Ireland's boycott is the latest in a series of moves that has seen the country at odds with Israel over its war in Gaza.

items.title: Watch: What did we learn from Trump's visit to China?
items.summary: President Trump has concluded a two-day visit to Beijing at a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

items.title: Warning of record global temperatures
items.summary: Warning of record global temperatures as chance of very strong El Niño grows

items.title: Hundreds of illegal motorbikes bulldozed in New York City crime crackdown
items.summary: A moped had been used in the deadly stray-bullet shooting of a 7-month-old in Brooklyn last month, officials said.

items.title: The Kabul rehab centre hit by deadly Pakistani strike
items.summary: Pakistan says it hit 'military and terrorist infrastructure' - but the UN and victims' families reject this claim.

items.title: 'Total lack of respect': Macron interrupts speaker to ask for silence
items.summary: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.

items.title: Watch: Soldier on parachuting to remote island to bring Hantavirus aid
items.summary: A specialist team helped supply critical medical support to Tristan da Cunha in the South Atlantic.
